scripts.build:js: npm run build -w @teleport-rs/client && npm run build -w @teleport-rs/vite
scripts.demo:export:dotnet: DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp dotnet build dotnet/examples/Teleport.Net.Demo/Teleport.Net.Demo.csproj -c Release -maxcpucount:1 -nodeReuse:false && DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp dotnet run --project dotnet/examples/Teleport.Net.Demo/Teleport.Net.Demo.csproj -c Release --no-build -- --export-only && cargo run -p teleport-cli -- generate-ts --input dotnet/examples/Teleport.Net.Demo/teleport.contract.json --output examples/demo/frontend/src/lib/api/generated
scripts.demo:export:go: cd go && GOCACHE=/tmp/go-build CGO_ENABLED=0 go run ./examples/demo --export-only && cd .. && cargo run -p teleport-cli -- generate-ts --input go/examples/demo/teleport.contract.json --output examples/demo/frontend/src/lib/api/generated
scripts.go:build: cd go && GOCACHE=/tmp/go-build CGO_ENABLED=0 go build ./...
scripts.go:test: cd go && GOCACHE=/tmp/go-build CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./...
